title: Application
full_text:
5.1.1.2 Application
Application
1) Except as permitted in Sentences (2) and (3), and except for systems and
equipment used exclusively for the control of smoke in the event of a fire, this Part
applies to heating, ventilating and air-conditioning systems and equipment.
2) A heating, ventilating or air-conditioning system or part thereof may
be exempted from some or all of the requirements in this Part where it can be
shown that the nature of the occupancy or the type of heating, ventilating or
air-conditioning equipment used makes it impractical to apply these requirements.
(See Note A-5.1.1.2.(2).)
3) This Part does not apply to the existing components of systems that are
extended to serve additions.

sentences.text: Except as permitted in Sentences (2) and (3), and except for systems and equipment used exclusively for the control of smoke in the event of a fire, this Part applies to heating, ventilating and air-conditioning systems and equipment.

A heating, ventilating or air-conditioning system or part thereof may be exempted from some or all of the requirements in this Part where it can be shown that the nature of the occupancy or the type of heating, ventilating or air-conditioning equipment used makes it impractical to apply these requirements. (See Note A-5.1.1.2.(2).)
This Part does not apply to the existing components of systems that are extended to serve additions.
